name: mercado-livre-anuncios-manager
description: Gestor independente e seguro de anúncios próprios do Mercado Livre.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @ml-manager/api" "npm run dev -w @marketsync/web"
scripts.dev:https: concurrently -n api,web,https -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @ml-manager/api" "npm run dev -w @marketsync/web" "node scripts/start-tunnel.mjs"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @ml-manager/api && npm run build -w @marketsync/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @ml-manager/api && npm run test -w @marketsync/web
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage -w @ml-manager/api && npm run test:coverage -w @marketsync/web --if-present
